summary: Provider Toggle Feature Testing Complete - All tests PASSED. The toggle component allows quick switching between Exely and HotelRunner Rate Manager pages.
features_tested: Provider toggle appears on Exely Rate Manager page (/rate-manager) with 'Exely' active - PASSED
Provider toggle appears on HotelRunner Rate Manager page (/hr-rate-manager) with 'HotelRunner' active - PASSED
Clicking 'HotelRunner' toggle on Exely page navigates to /hr-rate-manager - PASSED
Clicking 'Exely' toggle on HotelRunner page navigates to /rate-manager - PASSED
Each page loads its correct content after toggle navigation (different room types) - PASSED
Active toggle button has white background with shadow styling - PASSED
Inactive toggle button has zinc-500 text color - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: ProviderToggle.jsx: Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes for all elements
ProviderToggle.jsx: Uses react-router-dom useNavigate for SPA navigation
ProviderToggle.jsx: Conditional styling correctly shows active/inactive states
ProviderToggle.jsx: ArrowLeftRight icon on HotelRunner button provides visual cue for switching
RateManager.jsx: Correctly passes active='exely' to ProviderToggle
HRRateManager.jsx: Correctly passes active='hotelrunner' to ProviderToggle
context_for_next_testing_agent: Provider toggle feature is fully functional. The toggle appears at the top of both /rate-manager (Exely) and /hr-rate-manager (HotelRunner) pages. Clicking the inactive provider navigates to that provider's rate manager page. Each page shows different room types: Exely has Standart, Deluxe, Suite; HotelRunner has Corner Süit, Standart Oda, Deluxe Oda.

verification_summary.exely_page_active_state: PASS - Exely button shows active styling on /rate-manager
verification_summary.hr_page_active_state: PASS - HotelRunner button shows active styling on /hr-rate-manager
verification_summary.page_content_exely: PASS - Shows 'Exely - Fiyat ve Musaitlik' title
verification_summary.page_content_hr: PASS - Shows 'HotelRunner - Fiyat ve Musaitlik' title
verification_summary.different_room_types: PASS - Each provider shows different room types
